raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The artifact is organized around a thesis arc (gap → taxonomy → instantiation → finding); any meaningful 'look' must engage with whether the conceptual structure and contribution claim hold together.","R1.2":"Several logical chains are implicit: that the four taxa are exhaustive enough to cover 87% of failures, that deterministic detectors are sufficient operationalizations, and that architecture-level differences (CrewAI vs. AutoGen) are causally attributable to the taxa rather than to dataset or model confounds. These require consistency evaluation.","R1.3":"Specific quantitative claims are asserted as results (87% coverage, 42% role-bleed in CrewAI, 6% in AutoGen, 240 traces across three frameworks and three benchmarks). Evidence-claim alignment is a central concern if the reading is research-critical.","R1.6":"'Take a look at this paragraph' is a canonical surface-level prose-review prompt; writing quality, clarity, and register are a plausible primary intent independent of research content."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for a writing-quality review (prose clarity, flow, and style) or a research-content critique (validity and support of empirical claims, logical consistency of the framework, novelty of the contribution)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact is organized around a thesis arc (gap → taxonomy → instantiation → finding); any meaningful 'look' must engage with whether the conceptual structure and contribution claim hold together.
rationale.R1.2: Several logical chains are implicit: that the four taxa are exhaustive enough to cover 87% of failures, that deterministic detectors are sufficient operationalizations, and that architecture-level differences (CrewAI vs. AutoGen) are causally attributable to the taxa rather than to dataset or model confounds. These require consistency evaluation.
rationale.R1.3: Specific quantitative claims are asserted as results (87% coverage, 42% role-bleed in CrewAI, 6% in AutoGen, 240 traces across three frameworks and three benchmarks). Evidence-claim alignment is a central concern if the reading is research-critical.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look at this paragraph' is a canonical surface-level prose-review prompt; writing quality, clarity, and register are a plausible primary intent independent of research content.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a writing-quality review (prose clarity, flow, and style) or a research-content critique (validity and support of empirical claims, logical consistency of the framework, novelty of the contribution)?
